com.mentor.chs.api.report

Interface IXReport


  • public interface IXReport
    A report is defined by a collection of report modules( see IXReportModule). Typically a report corresponds to the HTML document that contains table. Report evaluation requires a a set of queries that scope down the content to be reported and processor (See IXReportProcessor) that relates the result of scoping queries with the entities queried in report modules. ()

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addCustomAttribute(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String value)
      add a custom attribute name, value for this report template
      void addCustomTag(java.lang.String tag, java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> attributes)
      add a user defined tag.
      void addModule(IXReportModule module)
      Adds a new module to the end of the list.
      java.lang.String evaluate(java.util.Collection<IXQuery> queries, IXConnectivityProcessor processor)
      Evaluates the report for intial query results and generates an XML output.
      java.lang.String evaluate(java.util.Collection<IXQuery> queries, IXConnectivityProcessor processor, IXFilterExpression configurationFilterExpression)
      Evaluates the report for intial query results and generates an XML output.
      void evaluate(java.util.Collection<IXQuery> queries, IXConnectivityProcessor processor, IXFilterExpression expression, java.io.PrintWriter w) 
      java.util.List<java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String>> getAttributesForCustomTag(java.lang.String tag)
      list of name value pairs associated with a tag name.
      java.util.Set<java.lang.String> getCustomAttributes()
      Access user defined attribute names.
      java.lang.String getCustomAttributeValue(java.lang.String attributeName)
      get custom attribute value for the given attribute name.
      java.util.Set<java.lang.String> getCustomTags()
      get all user defined tags in the report module definition( added using the method addCustomTag)
      java.util.List<IXReportModule> getModules()
      Returns the reporting modules defined for the report.
      java.lang.String getTitle()
      returns the title of this report.

    • Method Detail

      • addModule

        void addModule(IXReportModule module)
        Adds a new module to the end of the list. A module would typically correspond to a table of a html report.
        Parameters:
        module - module

      • evaluate

        java.lang.String evaluate(java.util.Collection<IXQuery> queries,
                          IXConnectivityProcessor processor)
        Evaluates the report for intial query results and generates an XML output. Evaluation proceeds by first evaluating queries supplied as scope. For each report module and each enity queried in report module, the report processor is used to return the entities on which result expressions are applied to define the content of the report as xml string.
        Parameters:
        queries - -- set of queries that form the scope of the queries in the report.
        processor - -- processor to help relate the entities returned from input queries with the entities queried in the reoprt.
        Returns:
        report xml string.

      • evaluate

        void evaluate(java.util.Collection<IXQuery> queries,
              IXConnectivityProcessor processor,
              IXFilterExpression expression,
              java.io.PrintWriter w)

      • getModules

        java.util.List<IXReportModule> getModules()
        Returns the reporting modules defined for the report. report modules define the content for the report,
        Returns:
        modules contained in this report as a list

      • getTitle

        java.lang.String getTitle()
        returns the title of this report.
        Returns:
        title

      • addCustomAttribute

        void addCustomAttribute(java.lang.String name,
                        java.lang.String value)
        add a custom attribute name, value for this report template
        Parameters:
        name - -- attribute name
        value - -- attribute value

      • getCustomAttributeValue

        java.lang.String getCustomAttributeValue(java.lang.String attributeName)
        get custom attribute value for the given attribute name.
        Parameters:
        attributeName - -- custom attribute name
        Returns:
        custom attribute value corresponding to attributeName.

      • getCustomAttributes

        java.util.Set<java.lang.String> getCustomAttributes()
        Access user defined attribute names.
        Returns:
        set of user defined attributes on this report module.

      • addCustomTag

        void addCustomTag(java.lang.String tag,
                  java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> attributes)
        add a user defined tag. This is useful typically as a hint to xml formatter after xml report is generated. For example a custom tag 'groupBy' with attribute title='XXX' might indicate which column to group by while formatting. Note: tag names need not be distinct.
        Parameters:
        tag - - custom tag name
        attributes - -- attributes of the custom tag as a map.

      • getCustomTags

        java.util.Set<java.lang.String> getCustomTags()
        get all user defined tags in the report module definition( added using the method addCustomTag)
        Returns:
        set of names of custom tags.

      • getAttributesForCustomTag

        java.util.List<java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String>> getAttributesForCustomTag(java.lang.String tag)
        list of name value pairs associated with a tag name. Since tags may be duplicated, there may be more than one entry in list returned.
        Parameters:
        tag - - custom tag name
        Returns:
        list of attribute-name attribute-value pairs.

      • evaluate

        java.lang.String evaluate(java.util.Collection<IXQuery> queries,
                          IXConnectivityProcessor processor,
                          IXFilterExpression configurationFilterExpression)
        Evaluates the report for intial query results and generates an XML output. Evaluation proceeds by first evaluating queries supplied as scope. For each report module and each enity queried in report module, the report processor is used to return the entities on which result expressions are applied to define the content of the report as xml string.
        Parameters:
        queries - -- set of queries that form the scope of the queries in the report. @param processor -- processor to help relate the entities returned from input queries
        processor - -- processor to help relate the entities returned from input queries with the entities queried in the reoprt.
        configurationFilterExpression - configuration in the project or design.
        Returns:
        report xml string. with the entities queried in the reoprt. @param queries -- set of queries that form the scope of the queries in the report.
